message:
refactor(cli): migrate utility commands to dynamic registry loading

Updates CLI commands to use loadRegistry() instead of static imports
from @jeffreysprompts/core/prompts/registry for consistency:

- utilities.ts: categories, tags, open, doctor, about commands
- collections.ts: collections command
- copy.ts: copy command
- save.ts: save command
- serve.ts: serve command

Also updates copy.test.ts to match new implementation.

This enables these commands to work with dynamically fetched prompts
and personal/offline libraries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
